title: 日本ダービーの後に・深淵に触れて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(It was as if the passage of time itself slowed to a
crawl.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I committed my heart and soul to that race, and
as I ran, I felt nothing else but a desperate desire
to win.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I just ran with everything I had. Forwards—to
victory, to the goal.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I want to win... I want to win!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I want to defeat Yaeno and Chiyono O, right here and now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The sound of... glass fracturing? Are my legs...
broken?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No, this is—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (There's no doubt in my mind. In that crucial moment of contest, I pounded on those sealed gates—the limits holding me back!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And yet... I couldn't quite make it through them,
and failed to claim victory.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Argh! I couldn't do it! And I was so close to
winning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It was in my hands! Losing wasn't an option!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(That overwhelming desire to reach the finish line
before them... It was that feeling that gave me a
glimpse into a world of possibilities!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I had no idea! To think that a race could show me
such a scene!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (If I could set foot into that world, then...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Then my—our—light! It would become even—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Right now, I...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I forgot all about surpassing my older sister...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to meet with Mejiro Ardan after her
excellent showing at the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I do apologize. I was unable to land you the title
of Derby trainer.
choice_data_list: That's okay. Besides, you look pretty content.
That's okay. Besides, you look pretty content.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: I couldn't ask for anything more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan did the very best she could at the
Japanese Derby. That's why, in this moment, she
looks so liberated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I'm over the moon to see her like
this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I had an experience most peculiar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As I neared the finish line, an unfamiliar sensation
welled up inside, as if the whole world was falling
still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the silence, I could hear two things very
clearly—Chiyono O and Yaeno's heartbeats, and
the sound of their feet hitting the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With that rhythm drawing me in... I pounded on
the gates holding me back—my own limits—and
caught a glimpse of the new world that lies
beyond them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sensation I felt in that moment—the firm
belief that I can aim for even greater
heights—lingers in my hands even now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And there was something else... Something that
took even me by surprise...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't until the race was over... that I
remembered my goal is to outshine my older
sister...
choice_data_list:
...That just goes to show that you were giving
your all as you competed with your rivals.

...That just goes to show that you were giving
your all as you competed with your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Giving my all... with my rivals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're quite right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Those two are my dearest friends... and my
toughest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's because I competed with everything I could muster—to the point that I forgot about my older sister...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And because they gave that race everything they had too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That I was able to glimpse that world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always striven to seize the moment with her
running, so today's discovery will likely change
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And it'll change me too. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan's legs carry her to a new
world of possibilities!
